creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Simon,

I guess this PR/patch has been lying around that long without comments
because the majority of people are not running 7.x any more and thus
cannot properly test the change with devices. Me neither, and as it might
break things for other users I'm hesitant to commit it; a compromise might
be to extract the O_NONBLOCK part of the patch and introduce an OPTION to
enable it only if the users wants to.

Regards,
Stefan
